outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated downside risk due to negative monthly GEX, heavy put volume, and bearish smirk skews.
outlook.summary: Market is trading below the 0DTE gamma flip with heavily bearish sentiment indicated by high put/call ratios. The 710 strike represents a massive structural RESONANCE level where all expirations align, serving as the primary battleground between Call resistance and Put support.

levels.motivazione: Major Call OI in 0DTE (33k) and Monthly (23k) creating a strong multi-expiry resistance ceiling.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Positive GEX below this level suppresses volatility; a break above triggers unstable short-gamma hedging.
Significant 0DTE Call OI (11k) with high volume (90k) acting as immediate intraday resistance.
Massive 0DTE Put volume (264k vs 8.8k OI) indicates unusual intraday activity and high hedging friction right at spot.
Largest 0DTE Put OI (22k) with extreme volume (223k) establishing the primary intraday support.
0DTE Max Pain level. Less than 0.5% from spot, acting as a powerful magnetic attraction for market makers today.
Critical strike dominating all timeframes: 0DTE Put/Call OI, Weekly Call Wall (15k OI), and Monthly Call Wall (33k OI).
Massive structural support aligning Weekly Put OI (39k) and Monthly Put/Call OI (39k/38k).
Very heavy Put OI in Weekly (67k) and 0DTE (11k). Bears strong defense line.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate. Highly positive total GEX across all expiries suppresses volatility, indicating a stable, range-bound environment with pinning behavior.
outlook.summary: The market is pinned exactly at the Monthly Gamma Flip (662.39). Dealers are heavily long gamma, which will naturally suppress large directional moves. The massive Positive GEX creates a magnetic effect, anchoring spot near current levels. A colossal joint Put/Call wall exists at 650, providing an impenetrable institutional floor, while 665 caps the immediate upside.

levels.motivazione: Exact monthly equilibrium point where cumulative GEX shifts. Intense 0DTE volume at 662/663 confirms extreme dealer and retail focus precisely at this level, creating a structural anchor.
Monster joint support with 15k OI (0DTE), 22k OI (Weekly), and 14k OI (Monthly). Flanked by massive Call OI in Weekly and Monthly. This is the ultimate institutional floor.
Significant joint Call resistance with 9.4k OI (Weekly) and 22.1k OI (Monthly). Serves as the immediate upside cap for the current positive-gamma environment.
0DTE Max Pain level. With positive total GEX, market makers will naturally gravitate and pin the price toward this level as intraday expiration approaches.
Heavy institutional put support with 33k OI (Weekly) and 13k OI (Monthly). Coincides with Weekly Max Pain, acting as a catastrophic downside structural failsafe.
Intermediate Call resistance with 8.1k OI (Weekly) and 19.2k OI (Monthly). Represents a secondary upside ceiling in the event of a positive gamma squeeze.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive GEX; expect range-bound conditions between major walls.
outlook.summary: Dealers are heavily long gamma (2.43B total GEX), actively suppressing volatility and pinning the market. The structural equilibrium is defined by the massive 27500 Call Wall Resonance above and the 26200 Put Wall Resonance below. Immediate resistance is clustered at 27400. A flat volatility skew confirms this neutral, range-bound expectation.

levels.motivazione: Major Call OI resistance across 0DTE (160 OI), WEEKLY (95 OI), and MONTHLY (451 OI). Market makers will heavily defend this level.
Significant Put OI support in 0DTE (478 OI), WEEKLY (47 OI), and MONTHLY (59 OI). Acts as a solid structural floor.
Confluence of Call OI in WEEKLY (117 OI) and MONTHLY (155 OI, 227 Vol). Immediate resistance just above spot.
Put OI concentration in 0DTE (71 OI) and MONTHLY (95 OI). Intermediate support level below spot.
Monthly gamma flip level indicating a critical shift in dealer positioning. A drop below triggers volatility expansion.
Massive Call OI in MONTHLY (3767 OI). Acts as a strong gravitational pull for price despite being below spot.
